normalisation by capacity may add a further useful value

The update frequency of remaining round trip

provided upon change of the battery status.

description: The battery passport can include additional

module level, if available. It should be defined and

charge rate (C-rate); equal to regulation definition.

description: As a non-mandatory data point the battery
passport should include the ratio between nominal battery
power in W and battery energy in Wh. It aims to provide an
indication of the applicable discharge and charge rate in
terms of rated capacity (C-rate) (see BattReg Annex IV Part
The update interval should be upon placement on the
market and upon change of the battery status.
description: Rated capacity is the total number of
